ratepay.installmentAmount.description: Amount the customer has to pay each month.

ratepay.paymentFirstday.description: Calendar day of the first payment.

ratepaydata.deliveryDate.description: Date the merchant delivered the goods to the customer.

ratepaydata.dueDate.description: Date by which the customer must settle the payment.

ratepaydata.invoiceDate.description: Invoice date, defined by the merchant. If not included, the invoice date is set to the delivery date.

ratepaydata.invoiceId.description: Identification name or number for the invoice, defined by the merchant.
